vanilla.name: Tackle
vanilla.NAME: MOVE_TACKLE
vanilla.desc: Charges the foe with a full-body tackle.
vanilla.lDesc: A physical attack in which the user charges, full body, into the foe.

erCustom.name: Eerie Fog
erCustom.NAME: MOVE_EERIE_FOG
erCustom.desc: An unnatural fog descends, draining stat boosts.
erCustom.lDesc: An eerie fog lasting eight turns drains boosts from non-Ghost and Psychic mons.
